macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Cryptocurrency Market Liquidations Reach $232 Million in Past 24 Hours
items.summary: The crypto market experienced significant liquidations totaling $232 million over the last 24 hours, according to data from CoinAnk reported by Foresight News.

items.title: Total Crypto Liquidations Hit $627 Million Amid Bitcoin Surge to $72,000
items.summary: Bitcoin's surge to $72,000 triggered a $470 million squeeze on bearish positions, contributing to overall market liquidations of $627 million in the past 24 hours due to sharp price action.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Drops 1.65% to $2.41 Trillion, Retains Bullish Sentiment
items.summary: The total crypto market capitalization fell 1.65% over the past 24 hours to $2.41 trillion, with most top coins declining except NEAR (+1.1%) and Tron (+0.3%), though bullish sentiment persists.

items.title: Massive Bitcoin News: Satoshi Potentially Revealed and Morgan Stanley Updates
items.summary: Recent video highlights major Bitcoin developments including speculation on Satoshi's identity, Morgan Stanley's significant news, and predictions for Ethereum and Solana amid market volatility.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta Releases Muse Spark, New High-Performance AI Model
items.summary: Meta announced Muse Spark, its first major AI model in over a year, outperforming Google Gemini on some benchmarks, competitive with OpenAI and Anthropic models, and significantly ahead of xAI's Grok; it excels in multimodal RAG, multi-agent orchestration, reasoning, and coding tasks while using far less compute.[1][2]

items.title: xAI's Elon Musk Announces Plans for Larger Upcoming Model
items.summary: Elon Musk revealed preparations for a larger model from xAI, signaling an aggressive new cycle of competition following recent releases from Meta, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google.[1]

items.title: OpenAI Chief Scientist Discusses AI Research Frontiers Including RL and Coding Agents
items.summary: Jakub Pachocki covers explosive growth in coding agents, reinforcement learning for long-horizon tasks, AI for science, chain-of-thought monitoring for alignment, and challenges in model generalization and power concentration.[3]

items.title: Anthropic Launches Managed Agents Amid Model Delay Over Security
items.summary: Anthropic introduced Managed Agents for zero-infrastructure automation, potentially rivaling tools like n8n, while delaying a model due to security concerns.[4]

items.title: Harness Engineering Emerges as Next Evolution in AI Coding
items.summary: Harness engineering is advancing AI coding agents by integrating deterministic steps, AI creativity, and iterative loops into automated systems that handle full workflows with one command.[5]

items.title: Circle's Arc Blockchain Enables AI Agents in Financial Systems
items.summary: Circle's Jeremy Allaire discusses how Arc Blockchain and stablecoins like USDC create a trustworthy medium for AI agents to store value, execute contracts, and drive an agentic economy with tokenized assets.[6]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pokemon Champions Releases on Switch 1 and Switch 2 Amid Backlash
items.summary: Pokemon Champions has launched for Switch 1 and Switch 2, facing criticism for questionable quality and numerous concerns about its current state.

items.title: PlayStation State of Play Reportedly Set for Next Week
items.summary: Sony is preparing a major State of Play event next week, with rumors of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake reveal on April 16th, possible Persona 4 revival, and Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition rated for June release.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Reviews Go Live
items.summary: Reviews for Forza Horizon 6 have officially launched, marking a key moment for the racing series.

items.title: 007 First Light Delayed on Switch 2
items.summary: The game 007 First Light has been delayed for its Switch 2 release.

items.title: State of Decay 3 Announces Alpha Playtest
items.summary: Undead Labs surprised fans with a new trailer announcing an alpha playtest for State of Decay 3 after four years of quiet development.

items.title: Call of Duty Warzone Receives New Meta Update
items.summary: Warzone's latest update introduces a new weapon, Modern Warfare news, supply drops return, with balance changes to weapons like M15 mod, RK9, including nerfs and buffs to recoil, damage, and mobility.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
